name: Anonymous
desc: The author of this quote chose to remain un-named.

name: Abraham Lincoln
desc: The 16th President of the United States who preserved the Union during the American Civil War and issued the Emancipation Proclamation, bringing an end to slavery in America.

name: Anne Frank
desc: A young Jewish girl who documented wartime while she hid from the Nazis during the occupation of the Netherlands. She is known for being a symbol of hope and resilience.

name: Buddha
desc: Ancient spiritual teacher and philosopher from ancient India who teaches on mindfulness and ethics.

name: Florence Nightingale
desc: Philosopher and trailblazer of modern nursing, who saved countless lives during the Crimean War by changing sanitary care standards and establishing better medical training for women.

name: Frederick Douglass
desc: Iconic American abolitionist, orator, writer, and statesman who escaped from slavery and dedicated his life to universal equality and civil rights.

name: George Eliot
desc: One of the leading English novelists of the Victorian era, known for psychological insight.
